title: Count Sorted Vowel Strings
description:
Given an integer n, return _the number of strings of length_ n _that consist only of vowels (_a_,_ e_,_ i_,_ o_,_ u_) and are lexicographically sorted._

A string s is lexicographically sorted if for all valid i, s[i] is the same as or comes before s[i+1] in the alphabet.
